DISCARDMOD-ASHEN_AEGIS.description: Gain 8 Block, then discard 1 card. Discard: Gain 10 Block.
DISCARDMOD-ASHEN_AEGIS.title: Ashen Aegis
DISCARDMOD-ASH_VEIL.description: Apply 3 Ash Veil. Each card-effect discard, gain 3 Block.
DISCARDMOD-ASH_VEIL.title: Ash Veil
DISCARDMOD-CRIPPLING_MANUSCRIPT.descript: Apply 2 Weak and 2 Vulnerable. Discard: Apply 1 Weak and 1 Vulnerable to all enemies.
DISCARDMOD-CRIPPLING_MANUSCRIPT.title: Crippling Manuscript
DISCARDMOD-DARK_FLAME_FRAGMENT.descripti: Draw 1 card, then discard 2 cards. Discard: Discard 1 card.
DISCARDMOD-DARK_FLAME_FRAGMENT.title: Dark Flame Fragment
DISCARDMOD-DARK_MOMENTUM.description: Apply 1 Dark Momentum (threshold 3). Every 3 card-effect discards, gain 1 Energy.
DISCARDMOD-DARK_MOMENTUM.title: Dark Momentum
DISCARDMOD-EMBER_VOLLEY.description: Deal 4 damage 3 times. Discard: Deal 4 damage twice to a random enemy.
DISCARDMOD-EMBER_VOLLEY.title: Ember Volley
DISCARDMOD-FADING_FORMULA.description: Deal 10 damage and gain 10 Block. If this remains in your hand at end of turn, discard it and trigger its discard effect. Discard: If this is your odd-numbered discard this turn, deal 18 damage to a random enemy. If this is your even-numbered discard this turn, gain 18 Block.
DISCARDMOD-FADING_FORMULA.title: Fading Formula
DISCARDMOD-FINAL_DRAFT.description: Deal 16 damage. Discard: Deal 10 damage to all enemies. For each card discarded at or beyond the 3rd this turn, deal 3 more (max +9).
DISCARDMOD-FINAL_DRAFT.title: Final Draft
DISCARDMOD-RECALL_SURGE.description: Return a card from your discard pile to your hand. Discard: Choose a card from your discard pile and return it to your hand, draw 1, discard 1, then place 1 card on top of your draw pile.
DISCARDMOD-RECALL_SURGE.title: Recall Surge
DISCARDMOD-SHATTERED_ECHO.description: Draw 2 cards, then discard 2 cards. Discard: Draw 1 card, then discard 1 card.
DISCARDMOD-SHATTERED_ECHO.title: Shattered Echo
DISCARDMOD-SWIFT_CUT.description: Deal 6 damage. Discard: Deal 7 damage to a random enemy.
DISCARDMOD-SWIFT_CUT.title: Swift Cut
DISCARDMOD-TOXIN_RECORD.description: Apply 5 poison stacks. Discard: Apply 3 poison stacks to all enemies.
DISCARDMOD-TOXIN_RECORD.title: Toxin Record
DISCARDMOD-VOID_SURGE.description: Apply 1 Void Surge. Each card-effect discard, deal 3 damage twice to a random enemy.
DISCARDMOD-VOID_SURGE.title: Void Surge
